title: GPT-5.5与GPT-5.5-Cyber扩展可信网络访问，助力网络安全
title_en: Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber
summary: OpenAI通过GPT-5.5和GPT-5.5-Cyber扩展了可信网络访问功能，帮助经过验证的防御者加速漏洞研究并保护关键基础设施。该模型专注于网络安全领域，提供增强的安全分析和自动化响应能力。OpenAI expands Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber, enabling verified defenders to accelerate vulnerability research and protect critical infrastructure with specialized cybersecurity capabilities.
